scripts.build: echo '[build] www/index.html is the Android source — edit it directly'
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.apk: npm run sync && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21 ANDROID_HOME=/opt/homebrew/share/android-commandlinetools ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.apk:release: npm run sync && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21 ANDROID_HOME=/opt/homebrew/share/android-commandlinetools ./gradlew assembleRelease
